utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 top-level items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each item in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with costs (explicit monthly costs for each and a total). Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with cost (home_contents with €53/month and a total). Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with cost (travel_insurance with €48/month and a total). Fully specified. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services with costs (lists services and states total_additional_cost €0/month due to discount). Fully specified. 5) total_budget: provides complete monthly/annual cost breakdown and savings. Fully specified. All 5/5 items are present and include the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four specific insurance products: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), HealthFirst Standard Plan (mental health), VitalPlus Standard Coverage (home contents), and TravelFirst Standard Plan (travel insurance). I matched each item name exactly to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings under their respective categories and extracted the numeric rating.
